environment.buildTool: Apache Maven 3.9.9 in official project build container
environment.repositoryStatus: Initially clean; final implementation commit contains exactly two authorized files and sealed worktree is clean.

task.userRequest: Start the replacement domain corpus with episode 0001 under the current bdd-java contracts. Reproduce the first deleted domain subject as a new-subject javaspec slice: com.magrathea.trustengine.x509.profile.CertificateProfileId. Implement exactly one externally meaningful behavior authorized by ADR 0001 and @req-x509-profile-integrity-001: a canonical profile identifier supplied in the documented x509-profile-v1-sha256-<64 lowercase hex> form is preserved and exposed as its complete textual value. Do not reintroduce implementation-detail APIs. Follow raw capture, pre-baseline launcher fingerprint, clean Git, empty manifest, Java 21 baseline, describe-before-edit, no-write structural RED, run --generate production creation, bounded GREEN, selected/subject/full 1/1, zero stubs, exact String value record shape, official Java 21 Maven one test/no unsupported warning, and exact two-file scope.

admission.reason: Complete sealed spec-driven RAW_EVENT_STREAM proves one authorized new-subject JavaSpec behavior with describe/generate boundaries, meaningful RED, coherent bounded GREEN, complete Java 21 verification, clean two-file scope, and privacy sanitization.

rawObservableEvents.summary: Successful exact selected-JAR fingerprint captured before baseline.
Java 21 Maven baseline passed with no tests.
JavaSpec describe generated the initial specification and no production class.
One bounded edit introduced exactly one authorized record-value example.
No-write selected dry-run failed on the missing record and planned exact production path.
JavaSpec generation first created production; selected assertion and pending-stub sentinel failed.
Generated production was reduced to exact String value component and implicit accessor.
First selected run exposed a stale generated-support signature.
Generate retry reproduced cache failure and proved production byte-identical.
Removed only ignored JavaSpec compilation output.
Official Java 21 Maven passed one test and zero unsupported warnings.
Committed exactly two authorized source files.

patches.description: Exact two-file patch between sealed initial and final commits.

commands.summary: Pre-authoring Maven baseline passed with no tests.
Meaningful no-write structural RED proved missing production record.
First production creator generated exact path; generated stub then failed meaningfully.
After ignored cache refresh, selected behavior passed 1/1.
OpenJDK 21 Maven passed one test with zero unsupported warnings.
Workflow schema and both repository validators pass.
